page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing the Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The system is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance integrates hardware acceleration with two NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs, delivering a combined total of 48 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

The lack of local storage and hyperthreading represents a specific architectural tradeoff, offering dedicated single-threaded core performance at the expense of local disk I/O. This configuration is highly suited for workloads such as GPU-accelerated machine learning inference, data science jobs, and specialized compute tasks that benefit from dedicated physical cores and high-speed network interfaces.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. Built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture, it features an Intel Xeon 6462C processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 3.3 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory and two NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs providing a total of 48 GB of VRAM. This instance does not feature local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage solutions, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The dedicated core allocation and lack of hyperthreading make it highly efficient for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance alongside GPU acceleration, such as machine learning inference, data science, and parallel computing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs with 48 GB VRAM for high-performance parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8t-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 32 Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and two NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and dual NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs for intensive parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
Two NVIDIA Ada Lovelace GPUs with 48 GB of total VRAM
256 GB of system memory providing 8 GB per core
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-speed connectivity
Zero local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions
Optimized for machine learning inference and parallel data processing
